answers: Scholarship tips: apply early, write a compelling personal statement, get strong recommendation letters, and apply to many.
Types: merit-based, need-based, subject-specific, country-specific, and diversity scholarships.
Top scholarships: Fulbright, Chevening, DAAD, Erasmus Mundus, ADB-JSP, and many university-specific ones.
Scholarship pawar upay: valo result koro, strong essay likho, recommendation letter nao, ar onek jaygay apply koro.
